title: Camera Trajectory Generation
interaction_flow: Caller → build_camera_trajectory(initial_w2c_44:[4,4], K_33:[3,3], center_depth:float, video_len:int, trajectory:str, direction:str, strength:float)
build_camera_trajectory → [dispatch on trajectory type string]
[trajectory=='original'] → repeat initial_w2c_44 video_len times, return (w2cs:[T,4,4], Ks:[T,3,3])
[trajectory in spiral/spiral_center/spiral_outwards] → create_spiral_trajectory(initial_w2c_44, center_depth, n_steps, radius_x, radius_y, right, inwards, num_circles)

[trajectory in horizontal/horizontal_lift/horizontal_zoom/horizontal_outward/horizontal_still/horizontal_zoom_still] → create_horizontal_trajectory(initial_w2c_44, center_depth, n_steps, right, axis, distance, outwards)
[trajectory in horizontal_noise/horizontal_lift_noise/horizontal_zoom_noise] → create_horizontal_with_noise_trajectory(..., noise_percentage)
[trajectory==horizontal_zoom_bend] → create_horizontal_zoom_with_bend_trajectory(..., bend_percentage_in, bend_percentage_out, axis_bend)
[trajectory==horizontal_zoom_noise_bend] → create_horizontal_zoom_with_noise_and_bend_trajectory(...)
[trajectory==horizontal_spiral] → create_spiral_horizontal_trajectory(initial_w2c_44, center_depth, n_steps, right, axis, distance, radius_x, radius_y, num_circles)
[trajectory==horizontal_simple] → inline linspace shift on w2c translation column
[trajectory==vertical_simple] → inline linspace shift on w2c translation column
[trajectory in back/back_simple] → create_back_trajectory(forward_trajectory:[T,4,4], center_depth, radius_x, radius_y, right, invert_pos)
[trajectory==dolly_zoom] → create_dolly_zoom_trajectory(initial_w2c_44, K_33, center_depth, n_steps) → returns (seq:[T,4,4], Ks:[T,3,3])
[trajectory in orbit_horizontal/orbit_vertical] → create_orbit_trajectory(initial_w2c_44, center_depth, n_steps, angle, axis, direction)
[trajectory in rotate_zoom_in/rotate_zoom_out] → create_rotate_then_zoom_trajectory(initial_w2c_44, center_depth, n_steps, rotate_direction, zoom_direction, rotation_angle, zoom_distance)
[trajectory==rotate_spot] → create_rotate_spot_trajectory(initial_w2c_44, center_depth, n_steps, rotate_direction, rotation_angle)
[trajectory==rotate_spot_noise] → create_rotate_spot_with_noise_trajectory(initial_w2c_44, center_depth, n_steps, rotate_direction, rotation_angle, noise_percentage)
create_spiral_trajectory → for each frame: look_at_matrix(camera_pos, look_at) → view_matrix:[4,4]
create_spiral_trajectory → apply_transformation(trajectory:[N,4,4], world_to_camera_matrix:[4,4]) → [N,4,4]
create_orbit_trajectory → for each frame: compute (cx,cy,cz) on circular arc around look_at → look_at_matrix(camera_pos, look_at)
create_orbit_trajectory → apply_transformation(trajectory, world_to_camera_matrix)
create_horizontal_trajectory → for each frame: compute linear offset along axis → look_at_matrix(camera_pos, _look_at)
create_horizontal_trajectory → apply_transformation(trajectory, world_to_camera_matrix)
create_dolly_zoom_trajectory → for each frame: shift camera along z, update focal_length f proportional to D0/Di → look_at_matrix(camera_pos, look_at)
create_dolly_zoom_trajectory → apply_transformation(trajectory, world_to_camera_matrix), return (transformed_trajectory, intrinsics_list)
create_back_trajectory → create spiral positions (n_steps-1) → look_at_matrix each pos → apply_transformation(trajectory, forward_trajectory.flip(0)) → cat [forward, backward]
create_rotate_then_zoom_trajectory → first half: rotate Y-axis in-place; second half: translate along rotated_forward → apply_transformation
build_camera_trajectory → return (w2cs:[T,4,4], Ks:[T,3,3])
--- Lyra-1 alternative entry point ---

Caller → generate_camera_trajectory(trajectory_type, initial_w2c:[4,4], initial_intrinsics:[3,3], num_frames, movement_distance, camera_rotation, center_depth, device, num_circles, radius_x_factor, radius_y_factor)
generate_camera_trajectory → [clockwise/counterclockwise] → create_spiral_trajectory(world_to_camera_matrix, center_depth, n_steps, positive, camera_rotation, radius_x, radius_y, num_circles)
generate_camera_trajectory → [left/right/up/down/zoom_in/zoom_out] → create_horizontal_trajectory(world_to_camera_matrix, center_depth, n_steps, positive, axis, distance, camera_rotation)
generate_camera_trajectory → unsqueeze(0) → generated_w2cs:[1,T,4,4], generated_intrinsics:[1,T,3,3]
key_relationships: build_camera_trajectory imports/depends_on: create_spiral_trajectory, create_horizontal_trajectory, create_horizontal_with_noise_trajectory, create_horizontal_zoom_with_bend_trajectory, create_horizontal_zoom_with_noise_and_bend_trajectory, create_back_trajectory, create_dolly_zoom_trajectory, create_spiral_horizontal_trajectory, create_orbit_trajectory, create_rotate_then_zoom_trajectory, create_rotate_spot_trajectory, create_rotate_spot_with_noise_trajectory
all create_*_trajectory functions depend_on look_at_matrix (inner per-frame pose builder)
all create_*_trajectory functions depend_on apply_transformation (batched bmm post-multiply with initial w2c)
create_dolly_zoom_trajectory uniquely modifies intrinsics (focal length scaling D0/Di) in addition to pose
create_back_trajectory takes a full forward_trajectory tensor [T,4,4] and creates reversed spiral continuation
create_rotate_then_zoom_trajectory uses matrix_to_quaternion and quaternion_to_matrix indirectly via interpolate (defined but not called in trajectory builders)
important_notes: Two parallel implementations: Lyra-1 (cosmos_predict1/diffusion/inference/camera_utils.py) has generate_camera_trajectory returning [1,T,4,4]; Lyra-2 (lyra_2/_src/inference/) splits into camera_traj_utils.py (build_camera_trajectory dispatcher) + camera_utils.py (all primitives). All trajectories operate in normalized camera space starting at origin [0,0,0] with look_at=[0,0,center_depth], then post-multiply by initial_w2c via apply_transformation (bmm). dolly_zoom is the only trajectory that also modifies intrinsic matrices (focal length). CAMERA_TRAJECTORY_CHOICES tuple in camera_traj_utils.py defines the canonical CLI choices. CLI args added via add_camera_traj_args helper (parser, direction, strength, trajectory, fps, video_len).
core_math_utilities: look_at_matrix(camera_pos, target, invert_pos=True) → 4x4 view matrix, Y-up, t=-R@C
apply_transformation(Bx4x4, another_matrix) → torch.bmm(Bx4x4, another_matrix), handles dim==2 via unsqueeze+expand
slerp(quat1, quat2, t) → spherical linear interpolation between quaternions
get_translation_matrix(dx, dy, dz, device) → 4x4 translation matrix
interpolate(trajectory, n_steps_per_segment, device) → SLERP+lerp interpolation (defined but return missing in source)
